briefdescription.para: error codes for exceptions that may occur during unhexing
Converts bytes to uppercase hex representation.

simplesect.para: result containing array of bytes if input string is hex encoded and has even length
reads both uppercase and lowercase hexstrings

briefdescription.para: Unhex hex-string with 0x in the begining.

parameterdescription.para: hex string with 0x in the beginning
